name: GDrive Backup
description: Save & load your data to Google Drive!

load-game-options.name: Load game & editor options
load-game-options.description: Enable loading your saved game & editor options (e.g. quick keys, CBS, button rows, link controls, etc.) <cr>Note:</c> This doesn't restore every single option, mainly excludes graphics options.

slot-count.name: Save slots count
slot-count.description: Choose how many save slots are available. <cr>Note:</c> This setting is purely <cg>visual</c>, changing this value does <cy>not</c> delete your save files.

bottom-button.name: Main menu shortcut button
bottom-button.description: <cg>adds</cg> a button for GDrive Backup to the bottom of the main menu. (next to the geode button)
